zh.Lys-lez Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, F: 法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德利勒-藍諾易
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lys於大約1182年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德利勒-藍諾易時，他的父親Eudes II de Lannoy34歲，母親Blanche de Merville18歲。他和Jehanne de Landrecies至少有1個兒子。他去世於1212年享年31歲。

zh-hans.Lys-lez Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, F: 法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德利勒-藍諾易
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lys于大约1182年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德利勒-藍諾易时，他的父亲Eudes II de Lannoy34岁，母亲Blanche de Merville18岁。他和Jehanne de Landrecies至少有1个儿子。他去世于1212年享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lannoy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Lanham (see Langham ) or Lannon .

variants.name: Langham
meanings: English: habitational name from Langham (Dorset, Norfolk, Rutland, Lincolnshire, and Suffolk), or Longham (Norfolk). The Dorset and Rutland placenames probably derive from Old English lang ‘long’ + hamm ‘water meadow’. The Suffolk placename and Langham in Norfolk derive from Old English lang + hām ‘village, homestead’. The Lincolnshire placename derives from Old English lang or Old Norse langr ‘long’ + Old Norse holmr ‘island’. Longham in Norfolk derives from an Old English personal name Lāwa + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) + hām.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Lys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Czech and Slovak (Lysý): descriptive nickname from lysý ‘bald’. Compare Lisy .

variants.name: Lisy
meanings: Czech and Slovak (Lisý): variant of Lysý ‘bald’ (see Lysy ). Compare Lisa .

variants.name: Lysek
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jacek, Janusz, Ryszard.
Polish: nickname for a man with a bald pate, from a diminutive of Polish łysy ‘bald’ (see Lysy , Lysiak ).

variants.name: Lyssy
meanings: Americanized form of Czech and Slovak Lysý ‘bald’ (see Lysy ).

variants.name: Lissy
meanings: Americanized form of Czech and Slovak Lysý or Lisý ‘bald’ (see Lysy , Lisy ).
French: habitational name from Lissy, a commune in north-central France.

nameMeanings.name: Gilles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Aegidus, Old French Gide. See Giles .

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: back-formation from Yiddish Iserl (a metathesized form of Israel), the final -l having been taken as a hypocoristic ending.

variants.name: Issur
meanings: variant of   Iser .

nameMeanings.name: dit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Dorothy .

variants.name: Dorothy
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

nameMeanings.name: Gillion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Julian  , from which it was differentiated in spelling only in the 17th century.

variants.name: Jillian
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gillian .

en.lifeSummary: When Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lys was born about 1182, in Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Eudes II de Lannoy, was 34 and his mother, Blanche de Merville, was 18. He had at least 1 son with Jehanne de Landrecies. He died in 1212, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lys est né environ 1182, à Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Eudes II de Lannoy, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Blanche de Merville, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Jehanne de Landrecies. Il est décédé en 1212, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lys um 1182 in Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eudes II de Lannoy 34 und seine Mutter Blanche de Merville 18. Er hatte mit Jehanne de Landrecies mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1212 im Alter von 31 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lys è nato il circa 1182 nel Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Eudes II de Lannoy, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Blanche de Merville, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Jehanne de Landrecies. Morì nel 1212, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.Lys-lez Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, F: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードリス-レズ-ラノイ
ja.lifeSummary: Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lysが約1182年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードリス-レズ-ラノイで生まれた時，父Eudes II de Lannoyは34歳，母Blanche de Mervilleは18歳であった。彼はJehanne de Landreciesとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1212年に31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lys(이)가 대략 1182년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 리스-레즈-랜이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eudes II de Lannoy(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Blanche de Merville(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Jehanne de Landrecies(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1212년 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lys nasceu aproximadamente 1182, em Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Eudes II de Lannoy, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Blanche de Merville, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Jehanne de Landrecies. Ele faleceu em 1212, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lys родился около 1182 г. в местности лис-лез-ланнои, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Eudes II de Lannoy было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Blanche de Merville, 18. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Jehanne de Landrecies. Он умер в 1212 г. в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lys nació aproximadamente 1182, en Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Eudes II de Lannoy, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Blanche de Merville, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Jehanne de Landrecies. Murió en 1212, a la edad de 31 años.
